pr.title: feat(family): wire quick-add modal to garage inventory flow
pr.rollback: Revert PR2; no schema rollback required.

receipt.goal: Wire Family/Home quick-add modal to real inventory matcher and garage_items save flow without contaminating Find it/user_list_items.
verification_steps: Family quick-add now calls /api/inventory/match with 350ms debounce and min 3 chars
Candidate selection or explicit fallback is required before save
Selected candidate writes to garage_items with child/shared/unknown scope mapping
Fallback logs missing term to inventory_search_events without writing user_list_items
Family-local At home count refreshes from garage_items; subnav/global counters unchanged
